3154040.name: AERO BATTLE ROYALE Demo
3154040.description:
Experience the thrill of high-speed aerial combat in the Aero Battle Royale demo! Take control of a powerful aircraft and race through stunning skies, dodging obstacles and outmaneuvering opponents. But this isn't just a race - unleash your inner pilot and engage in intense dogfights with rival players!

Test your skills in a taste of the full Aero Battle Royale experience. Master your aircraft, discover exciting power-ups, and prepare for the ultimate battle for air supremacy. This demo features a thrilling slice of the full game, with even more exhilarating content to come.




Ready to take flight? Download the demo now and get a taste of the adrenaline-pumping action that awaits!

Note: This demo offers a limited experience. Unlock the full potential of Aero Battle Royale with the complete game, featuring additional maps, weapons, game modes, and more!
3154040.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 保加利亚语, 丹麦语, 荷兰语, 匈牙利语, 印度尼西亚语, 日语, 韩语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 简体中文, 瑞典语, 泰语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语
